clues.name: Stolen Macaw
clues.context: Rudebeak, Lance's prized macaw, was reported stolen.

clues.name: Fish Tacos
clues.context: Leftover takeout found in the bag at the office.

clues.name: Sunday
clues.context: Someone's birthday falls on this day.

clues.name: Thursday
clues.context: Detective has a dentist appointment this day.

clues.name: Friday
clues.context: Marked with a giant question mark on the calendar.

clues.name: Day Before Premiere
clues.context: Manager needed Lance at the house this day.

clues.name: Downtown Office
clues.context: The takeout delivery was brought here.

clues.name: Malibu Mansion
clues.context: VIP parking pass for this location found in the trash.

interactables.text: BEEP. 'Hey, it's Lance's manager. We need you at the house [the day before the premiere]! Don't be late!' BEEP. 'Hi honey, don't forget my birthday on [Sunday]!'
Smells like leftover [Fish Tacos]. The delivery receipt says it was brought to the [Downtown Office].
The month is almost over. The detective has circled [Thursday] for the dentist, and [Friday] is marked with a giant question mark.
'Pirate Cove 3' premieres this [Saturday]! But production halts as Lance's prized macaw, Rudebeak, is reported as a [stolen pet]!
A bunch of unpaid bills, and a shiny VIP parking pass for a [Malibu Mansion].
